notes: v1.2.37: DISABLED global hotkeys (pynput) — they interfere with Qt modal dialogs and cause crashes on image capture confirm. v1.2.36: Added logging to ImageDialog accept/reject/closeEvent and forced fsync on debug log. v1.2.35: Fixed QApplication.processEvents() loop with QEventLoop. v1.2.34: Fixed updater batch script bug. v1.2.33: Fixed progress bar loop reset. v1.2.32: Fixed crash when adding image actions to timeline — removed duplicate scene.addItem in _draw_image and added scene() guards before removeItem. v1.2.31: Fixed cv2 startup crash with noarchive=True. v1.2.30: Fixed timeline playback with pyqtSignal. v1.2.29: cv2 collect_all fix. v1.2.28: Excluded tkinter.
